titleStmt.title: SII 29.318: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 318. (A.R. No. B. 484 of 1961-62.) KABBŪR, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the Brahmadēva temple to the south east of the village.
It seems to refer to the construction of a temple and to the sculptor by name Krishna belonging to Pāṇḍurangapura. The record gives an account of the family of the sculptor.
It is dated Śaka 1570, Sarvadhāri, Kārttika ba. 11, Wednesday, corresponding to 1648 A.D., November 1.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī vēdavyāsāya namaḥ . brahma vātanayārthinā haragirau saṁrāghayaṁti (?) haraṁ tatra nayōpamaṁ mamadiśa
śrīmaṁta mārtārtihaṁ . Ityuktvā nijadakṣapāṇivilasatturyāṁgulī (dhāyata ?) ṣṭavātaṁ pradadau satāddaśa
sutaṁ satyaṁ jinaṁ dhārmmikaṁ . 1 . Anyaṁ śūrasamaṁ sudhāṁśusaddaśāṁ jetārama(rvi) taḷaṁ dātāraṁ dvijarāja vatprati dinaṁ saṁhā
rayaṁtaṁ ripūn . budhyādēva gurlapamaṁ vijayinaṁ dēvēṁdra vadvikramaṁ śrīmaṁtaṁ gajavāji paci sahitaṁ mānā
jinaṁ (?) mediśa . 2 . Evaṁ samārādhya haraṁ samīyaturjāyapartālabdhavarausvakaṁ gṛhaṁ . buktvāya bhōgānprati
labhya naṁdanau śrīśaṁ samārādhya nijāṁ gatiṁ gatau . 3 . tatputrau suguṇaiślādhyau pitṛbhakti ratau sadā .
vīrau śūrau vadānyauca lōkavikhyāta pauruṣau . 4 . śrīdhīmaṁtau satyavākyau śrīpatyāṁghri nikṣiviṇau . sūryacaṁdrāviva
khyātauvīryeśauryeparākramau . 5 . sūryacaṁdramasōḥ kīrtiḥ pūrvapaścimayōḥ sthitā . satputrayōḥ sphuṭaṁ kīrtiḥ sarvadi
kṣu susaṁsthitā . 6 . tatputrada cavittēna vṛṁdāvana manuttamaṁ . suvāpyārāmasahitaṁ ha ma virājitaṁ . 7 .
gōpāḷēnāṣṭha putrēṇa kāritaṁ tatpurōdha sā . nānāṁghripa latāgulmai rākīrṇa lōkasuṁdaraṁ . 8 . tābhyāṁ samārjitā bhū
mirniṣkaparyāya kalpitā . tribhāgā dhānyaniṣṭatyautūrīryā(yā) rāmahētave . 9 . grāvaṇō bhōdivaryēṇa kṛṣṇōnā
kāri śilpinā . pāṁḍuraṁgapurasthēna tatpādārbbānaṣēviṇā . 10 . rsvāstha nṛpaśāli vāhanaśakemyōmādri bāṇēṁdu
bhiryukte saṁvidi sarvadhāri(ṇi*)hareḥ sutpotya māsē site . pakṣe śrīśatithau budhyēca karabhe sutākāritaṁ māturgēha
midaṁ samāpti magamatkanyāgate vākyatau . 11 . śake 1570 sarvadhāri saṁvatsare dakṣiṇāyane kārtikamāse
[athāsi paje panāmā brahmaṇō patiḥ svajejināmā .] (?) tadānujau bāji Abājiti tatputrāvanupadaṁ vakṣye .This line has been engraved at the top of the inscription.
Digital edition of SII 29.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
